issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page containing only document release dates and links, no substantive content
Source type is 'listing_page' which violates Rule 5: reject homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, or search_page
No actual TBAC reports, financing estimates, or policy content present - only metadata about when documents were released
Source is too thin to have archival value per Rule 6

corrected_fields.summary: This is a Treasury Department navigation page listing documents released for the 2026 Q1 quarterly refunding cycle. Documents include financing estimates, TBAC (Treasury Borrowing Advisory Committee) reports, auction schedules, and buyback schedules released between January 16 and February 4, 2026. The page itself is an index and does not contain substantive policy content.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page serves as an entry point to Treasury's quarterly refunding documentation. The actual substantive documents (TBAC reports, financing estimates) would contain relevant information for Treasury market participants. However, this specific page is merely a navigation index without substantive policy or market content.
